title: Intense Smoky Argentinian Callaloo Skewers
description: A winey and shattering date-night Argentinian dish featuring callaloo, this recipe is Whole30-friendly and perfect for a special occasion. The callaloo is ice-bath-shocked and grilled to perfection on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped callaloo to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated callaloo onto the soaked cedar planks.
Place the planks on the grill and cook for 10 minutes per side.
After cooking, immediately submerge the planks in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the callaloo has cooled, slice it into thin strips.
Serve the smoky callaloo skewers hot, garnished with additional smoked paprika if desired.
